item.title: Petit Planet ‘Stardrift Test’ begins April 21
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Smartphone

Sign-ups now available.

miHoYo will host the “Stardrift Test” for cosmic life simulation game Petit Planet beginning April 21 across PC, iOS, and Android, the company announced. An end date was not announced. Sign-ups are now available via the official website.

The test will support the following languages: English, Japanese, French, Russian, Thai, Indonesian, and Simplified Chinese text, and English, Japanese, and Chinese voice-overs.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Here is an overview of the test, via miHoYo:

Named the “Stardrift Test,” this upcoming beta will begin on April 21, introducing new Neighbors, enhanced Starsea Voyage experiences, and additional activities at the Galactic Bazaar. The game blends the joy of creation, companionship, and community-driven experiences, transforming the universe into a canvas of infinite possibilities. Sign-ups for the closed beta are now open on the official website.

In Petit Planet, players take on the role of a Planet Tender, stepping into the vast Starsea with a planet to call their own. As planets connect to form galaxies, new stories begin to unfold. Here, you can live however you like: farming, fishing, beachcombing, cooking… Spend relaxed and fulfilling days on your planet alongside your fuzzy Neighbors, and let your imagination run wild as you decorate your home or shape your own stylish landscapes. You can also explore the Starsea and forge connections with people and things at the ever-bustling Galactic Bazaar. Each bond you form with Neighbors and the world around you weaves into an ever-growing web of connections that keeps the universe flourishing. As these bonds deepen and planets thrive, Luca, the vitality that flows through all things, shapes new landscapes and brings wondrous changes to your world.

New Neighbors will make their debut in this closed beta, each bringing their own personalities, stories, and dreams to Petit Planet. As Planet Tenders, players can invite their fuzzy companions to settle on their planet, where heartfelt conversations, thoughtful gifts, and all kinds of meaningful interactions become part of everyday life. Life on Petit Planet is further enriched with updates to the Starsea Voyage and expanded activities at the Galactic Bazaar. With the Starsea Map, players can hop on their vehicles with Neighbors and set off to explore a variety of vibrant Islets. Beyond exploration, the Galactic Bazaar remains a lively social hub, where players can gather for coffee, relax by the bonfire, try fortune-telling, dance with friends, and even take part in auctions, creating wonderful memories together.

Confirmed for PC and mobile, with additional platforms in development, Petit Planet continues to explore its vision for multiplayer gameplay and immersive cozy experiences.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Stardrift Test Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/petit-planet-stardrift-test-begins-april-21
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Cult raising simulation game TOMAK: Save the Earth Regeneration now available for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Free to claim via Epic Games Store until April 16.

Publisher Netmarble and developer Netmarble Monster have released TOMAK: Save the Earth Regeneration, a remastered version of the cult hit visual novel TOMAK: Save the Earth in celebration of its 25th anniversary, for PC via Epic Games Store. It is available to claim for free until April 16, after which it will cost $8.99. It supports English, Japanese, and Korean language options.

Here is an overview of the game, via Epic Games Store:

About

To celebrate its 25th anniversary, the legendary 2001 PC classic TOMAK: Save the Earth is back, now on the Epic Games Store!

Prepare for the most bizarre yet beautiful cohabitation you’ve ever experienced. Enraged by human corruption, the gods have decreed Earth’s destruction. But Evian, the Goddess of Love, descends to save the humanity—only to lose her body due to divine opposition. Now, she’s ended up in your room… planted in a flowerpot with only her head.

You have exactly three years. Nurture her, prove that true love still exists, and help Evian regain her goddess form to save the world!

Key Features

  • A Surreal Blend of Shocking Visuals and Emotion – Experience the unconventional—a goddess in a flowerpot. Despite the bizarre concept, stunning high-detail illustrations and a lyrical soundtrack create a uniquely immersive atmosphere.
  • Deep and Authentic Life-Sim Mechanics – Evian’s survival depends entirely on your care. Engage in heartfelt conversations, build an emotional bond, and manage her growth. Your dedication over three years determines whether she ascends or the world ends.
  • Every Choice Matters – Your path is shaped by the decisions you make. From divine resurrection to tragic destruction, discover a wide range of endings based on how you raise her.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/cult-raising-simulation-game-tomak-save-the-earth-regeneration-now-available-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Fruit Mountain Party launches April 23
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

Currently in Early Access for PC.

Multiplayer party 3D puzzle game Fruit Mountain Party will leave Early Access and launch for Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam on April 23, developer BeXide announced. Users who purchase the Switch version can upgraded to the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition via a paid “Upgrade Pack.”

Fruit Mountain Party first launched in Early Access for PC on August 28, 2025.

“During Early Access, we received a great deal of valuable feedback from players, particularly around online play,” BeXide said in the announcement. “We would like to extend our sincere thanks to everyone who supported the game during this period. For the full release, we’ve focused on improving overall stability and gameplay experience based on your feedback.”

Here is an overview of the game, via BeXide:

About

The mega-hit 3D puzzle game Fruit Mountain—where you merge fruits to make them bigger—is now a party battle game for everyone!

This time, it’s a fruit battle!? Jump into versus mode with up to four players!

With items and wild surprises, it’s a chaotic battle full of laughs!

Keep stacking those fruits!

Easy to Play

  • Just toss fruits onto the plate and stack them up.
  • Merge two of the same fruit to create a bigger one!
  • The bigger the fruit you make, the higher your score climbs!
  • Be careful not to let fruits fall off the plate—merge them skillfully!
  • Master your stacking technique and take on your rivals!

Battle Together!

  • Compete Against Rivals Worldwide Online – Create a Room and invite friends to battle anytime, anywhere!
  • Local Versus Play Offline Too – Up to four players can play locally on a single Nintendo Switch! Get everyone together for some fun!

Tons of Game Modes

Multiple versus modes! Try different styles and have a blast!

  • Standard Race
  • Thief Frenzy
  • Fruit of the Sun
  • Great Harvest
  • Survival

Single-Player Too

Hone your skills against NPCs and prepare for online battles!

In “Time Attack” mode, race to complete a watermelon as fast as you can!

Aim for the fastest time! Climb the rankings!

Collection

Customize your plate with the dress-up feature! Show off your style with your favourite plate!

Nintendo Switch 2 Edition Features

  • Frame Rate – Improved frame rates provide smoother gameplay.
  • GameShare – With just one copy of the software, you can use “GameShare” with nearby people or “GameChat” members online, allowing up to four players to play together on their own screens.

Watch a new set of trailers below.

Switch 2 Release Date Trailer

Switch Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/fruit-mountain-party-launches-april-23
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Nagi no Koi for PS4, Switch launches April 23
item.content:encoded:
• PS4
  • Switch

Features both English and Japanese language options.

The PlayStation 4 and Switch versions of Japanese-style visual novel Nagi no Koi will launch digitally on April 23 for 2,700 yen, publisher Entergram and developer Nutrients announced. It will support both English and Japanese language options.

Nagi no Koi first launched for PC on August 20, 2021 in Japan, followed by an English-localized Steam release on January 14, 2025.

While the Steam version only included voice-overs for the four female leads, the console versions add voices to the male and minor female characters for a fully voiced experience, as well as feature a revamped user interface.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Nagi no Koi is a Japanese-style visual novel where two stories intersect.

Players read through the story and make choices at branching points to change it.

Key Features

  • Genre: Japanese visual novel where players made choices based on their feelings.
  • Play time: Six hours (if you listen to all of the voice lines).
  • Overview: The game is divided in two parts. (The first part is divided into two chapters, each of which consisting of three parts following a traditional Japanese narrative structure: introduction, climax, and closure. After completing the two chapters players can then choose the second part of the story.)
  • Voices: Only the main female characters are voiced.

Recommended For

  • People who like visual novel type games.
  • People who like emotionally intense stories.
    People who like pure love stories.

Synopsis

—Chapter of the Red Spider Lily

Masahide’s dream was to become the Lord that would rule this land.

But his dream, along with his ego, was crushed, leaving him without any pride.

It was then where a girl named Sahana scolded him for living his life as a mere cog of the government.

He enters into a loveless political marriage with Sahana, but that relationship slowly changes them both.

As it gradually transforms into a passionate relationship, Masahide decides to pursue a dream he once gave up on.

—Chapter of the Water Lily

A man without memories.

Completely lost, unable to remember even his name, is saved by a girl named Suirin.

For Suirin’s sake, he turns his existence around.

Across the sea, where the nagidori calls.

Kai’s memories lie dormant in the sea.

Cast

  • Suirin (voiced by Tanemaki)
  • Sahana (voiced by Yurara)
  • Shenhua (voiced by Sasorihime)
  • Aoi (voiced by Sakura)

Mature Content in This Game

This game contains depictions of violence, gore, references to sexual acts, and scenes involving alcohol consumption.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/nagi-no-koi-for-ps4-switch-launches-april-23
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Original Resident Evil, Resident Evil 2, Resident Evil 3: Nemesis, and Breath of Fire IV now available via Steam
item.content:encoded:
The original versions of Resident Evil, Resident Evil 2, and Resident Evil 3: Nemesis, as well as Breath of Fire IV are now available via Steam, following earlier releases on GOG. The Steam releases are co-developed by Capcom and GOG. Each title is available at a launch discount price of $4.99, after which they will cost $9.99.

Resident Evil

About

“Evil Has a New Address. Yours.”

Your Special Tactics and Rescue Squad has been choppered to a remote mansion to investigate a biotechnical experiment gone hideously wrong. Before you can say “mass murder,” you’re plunged straight into a deathtrap writhing with man-eating freaks, swarming crows and rabid dogs.

Arm yourself with knives and flame-throwers scavenged from dead teammates. Solve puzzles, disarm traps and unearth mysteries. But beware: every move you make draws you deeper into the deadly embrace of Resident Evil.

Quality-of-Life Features

  • All four localizations of the game included (English, German, French, Japanese).
  • Improved DirectX game renderer.
  • New rendering options (Windowed Mode, Vertical Synchronization Control, Gamma Correction, Integer Scaling, Anti-Aliasing and more).
  • Improved timing of the cutscenes.
  • Improved game video player.
  • Improved game registry settings.
  • Issue-free game exit and task switching.

Graphic Option Settings Overview

  • Display Mode – Provides the control over monitor resolution and refresh rate.
  • Presentation – Provides the control over presentation mode (fullscreen / windowed).
  • Aspect Ratio Correction – Provides the control over image aspect ratio correction.
  • Scaling Method – Provides the control over image scaling mode (how image is scaled on a monitor).
  • Vertical Synchronization – Provides the control over vertical synchronization (frame synchronization).
  • Gamma Correction – Provides the control over gamma correction (image brightness).
  • Anisotropic Filtering – Provides the control over anisotropic texture filtering technique (texturing quality).
  • Antialiasing – Provides the control over anti-aliasing technique (3D geometry edges smoothing).

Warning: The difference of each settings may be difficult to distinguish depending on the environment.

Key Features

  • Completely uncut, with even more blood, graphic violence and gory scenes than the worldwide monster hit version on PlayStation.
  • A swarm of unknown horrors prowl the mansion’s hundreds of rooms, including its underground lairs, the graveyard and some unwelcoming guest houses.
  • Unprecedented detail-intense texture maps, shadows and lighting effects, plus ever-changing camera angles, create a frighteningly rich 3D environment.
  • Choose to play tough guy marksman Chris Redfield or hardcore demolition expert Jill Valentine, both brought to life with realistic polygon character graphics.
  • Ominous digital surround soundtrack features haunting music that intensifies the action.

This re-released version of the game was co-developed by GOG.

Resident Evil 2

If the suspense doesn’t kill you, something else will…

Immerse yourself in the ultimate test of survival. Face your fears in this terror-filled classic edition of Resident Evil 2 for PC containing more horror, more mutant creatures, and more evil than before.

Quality-of-Life Features

  • Six localizations of the game included (English, German, French, Italian, Spanish, Japanese).
  • Improved DirectX game renderer.
  • New rendering options (Windowed Mode, Vertical Synchronization Control, Gamma Correction, Integer Scaling and more).
  • Improved audio volume and panning.
  • Improved cutscenes and subtitles.
  • Improved savegame manager.
  • Improved game video player.
  • Issue-less game exit.
  • Improved game registry settings.
  • Improved key-binding settings and audio settings screens.
  • Improved end credits in the German version.
  • Fixed issues with Rooms 114 and 115 (missing text), Room 210 (invisible diary), and Room 409 (looping sound).
  • 4th Survivor and Tofu modes enabled from the very beginning.

Graphic Option Settings Overview

  • Display Mode – Provides the control over monitor resolution and refresh rate.
  • Presentation – Provides the control over presentation mode (fullscreen / windowed).
  • Aspect Ratio Correction – Provides the control over image aspect ratio correction.
  • Scaling Method – Provides the control over image scaling mode (how image is scaled on a monitor).
  • Vertical Synchronization – Provides the control over vertical synchronization (frame synchronization).
  • Gamma Correction – Provides the control over gamma correction (image brightness).
  • Anisotropic Filtering – Provides the control over anisotropic texture filtering technique (texturing quality).
  • Antialiasing – Provides the control over anti-aliasing technique (3D geometry edges smoothing).

Key Features

  • Two separate adventures! Command Leon S. Kennedy, a rookie cop who stumbles onto the carnage reporting for his first duty, or play as Claire Redfield, desperately searching for her missing brother.
  • Cutting edge 3D accelerated graphics that create a terrifying, photo-realistic experience.
  • 3D accelerated graphics and non 3D accelerated settings to maximize performance whatever your setup.
  • Features complete versions of both original U.S. and the original Japanese versions of Resident Evil 2.
  • New Extreme Battle Mode: Battle your way through hordes of zombies as your play the hyper-intensive challenge that changes every time you play.
  • All new Resident Evil 2 picture gallery.
  • The game’s secret scenario available from the very beginning (no need to finish it under certain conditions first).

This re-released version of the game was co-developed by GOG.

Resident Evil 3: Nemesis

It’s in your blood.

Join Jill Valentine, the heroine and amazing survivor of the notorious disaster at the mansion, as her nightmare continues. After resigning from S.T.A.R.S. Jull now prepares to head out of Raccoon City… but it’s not going to be easy. Caught in a town crawling with flesh eating zombies, more than ever she must rely on brute force and cunning to find a way to escape alive. This unique adventure intricately reveals more of Umbrella Corporation’s nightmarish plot and picks up just hours before the events from Resident Evil 2.

Quality-of-Life Features

  • Six localizations of the game included (English, German, French, Italian, Spanish, Japanese).
  • Mercenaries Mode included.
  • Improved DirectX game renderer.
  • New rendering options (Windowed Mode, Vertical Synchronization Control, Gamma Correction, Integer Scaling and more).
  • Improved graphics engine initialization and restart.
  • Improved video subtitles.
  • Improved options dialog.
  • Issue-less task switching.
  • Improved mouse cursor visibility.

Graphic Option Settings Overview

  • Display Mode – Provides the control over monitor resolution and refresh rate.
  • Presentation – Provides the control over presentation mode (fullscreen / windowed).
  • Aspect Ratio Correction – Provides the control over image aspect ratio correction.
  • Scaling Method – Provides the control over image scaling mode (how image is scaled on a monitor).
  • Vertical Synchronization – Provides the control over vertical synchronization (frame synchronization).
  • Gamma Correction – Provides the control over gamma correction (image brightness).
  • Anisotropic Filtering – Provides the control over anisotropic texture filtering technique (texturing quality).
  • Antialiasing – Provides the control over anti-aliasing technique (3D geometry edges smoothing).

Warning: The difference of each settings may be difficult to distinguish depending on the environment

Key Features

  • Third-person perspective.
  • 3D and 2D graphics
  • Prerendered graphics
  • Science-fiction, horror, and zombies themes.
  • More zombies, more terror, and even more evil.
  • More challenging enemies that come back to life at any time.
  • Face off against the most terrifying mutations stalking the streets of Raccoon City.
  • More detailed character actions: Try the dodge move to avoid an enemy’s attack.
  • Interact with the environment like never before: Use background objects defensively.
  • A unique new drama which reveals more details of Umbrella Corporation’s devious activities from the Resident Evil series.

This re-released version of the game was co-developed by GOG.

Breath of Fire IV

Story

In a faraway world, two continents float, separated by a vast swampland. For eons, no contact existed between the two continents because ships couldn’t sail across the expanse. At last, when the historic first contact was made between the two powers, war erupted!

After long and costly fighting between the Fou Empire in the west and an alliance of countries in the east, both sides exhausted all their strength and resources. With no other alternative, the two powers agreed to an armistice.

One year later, Princess Elena vanished. She had been traveling in the east from town to town, exploring battlegrounds and visiting war veterans. Her trail vanished in a small town near the front line. Nobody knew her whereabouts!

The Eastern Alliance wanted to avoid sending a large army to the front. Such a move would be a political blunder, breaking the armistice and stirring up hostilities. It became impossible to carry out a large-scale search for Elena. Time passed… with no sign of the princess.

Elena’s sister, Princess Nina, finally makes up her mind. She leaves on a journey in search of her sister – by herself.”

Characters

  • Ryu – Ryu meets Nina while he is lying unconscious on a street in a desert town in the eastern continent. His race and native land are unknown. Ryu has a Dragon’s Eye, which empowers him amazing abilities to transform into a dragon and summon dragons.
  • Nina – The princess of Wyndia, a town of the Fae tribe (winged folk). Nina meets Ryu on her journey to seek her lost sister Elena. Though somewhat naïve, Nina is skilled in Healing magic.
  • Scias – A mercenary soldier, Scias was hired by the eastern side during the war. Scias becomes the party’s watcher. He is very quiet and aloof from the world. Scias can perform a powerful double attack with his sword.
  • Cray – A young leader of the Woren tribe (cat people) in the eastern alliance, Cray joins Nina to search for Princess Elena, his childhood friend. He has a strong sense of responsibility and acts as the leader of the party. His high offensive and defensive abilities are very dependable.
  • Ershin – Ershin wears completely sealed armor to protect her from any kind of curse. Since she wears the armor all the time, no one knows her real face or background. She meets the party in a mysterious place polluted by a curse and decides to join them.
  • Ursula – Ursula is a middle-class leader of the Fou Empire. She came to the eastern continent in search of dragons, and meets up with Ryu and his companions. Ursula was brought up in the military, and knows very little about worldly concerns. She is excellent at attacking with both magic and weapons.
  • Fou-Lu – Fou-lu unified the western continent single-handedly with his paranormal powers. He became the first emperor of the Fou Empire several hundred years ago. Despite his youthful look, he has mystic dignity. It is said that he predicted his own resurrection as he passed away.

Quality-of-Life Features

  • All two localizations of the game included (English and Japanese).
  • Improved DirectX game renderer.
  • New rendering options (Windowed Mode, Vertical Synchronization Control, Gamma Correction, Integer Scaling, Anti-Aliasing, and more).
  • Improved audio engine (restored missing environmental sounds and audio configuration).
  • Improved keyboard and mouse support.
  • Improved Warehouse and Crane minigames.
  • Improved F9 exit screen.
  • Issue-free battle and combo system (all crashes have been fixed).
  • Issue-free cutscene scripting.
  • Issue-free task switching.

Graphic Option Settings Overview

  • Display Mode – Provides the control over monitor resolution and refresh rate.
  • Presentation – Provides the control over presentation mode (fullscreen / windowed).
  • Aspect Ratio Correction – Provides the control over image aspect ratio correction.
  • Scaling Method – Provides the control over image scaling mode (how image is scaled on a monitor).
  • Vertical Synchronization – Provides the control over vertical synchronization (frame synchronization).
  • Gamma Correction – Provides the control over gamma correction (image brightness).
  • Anisotropic Filtering – Provides the control over anisotropic texture filtering technique (texturing quality).
  • Antialiasing – Provides the control over anti-aliasing technique (3D geometry edges smoothing).

Warning: The difference of each settings may be difficult to distinguish depending on the environment

Key Features

  • Stunning New and Improved Graphics – High-resolution, animated characters in vast 3D worlds.
  • More Than 200 Spells to Learn and Master – Unlock new magic from opponents.
  • Two Epic Intertwining Storylines – Follow the fates of Ryu and Fou-Lu in this classic RPG Adventure!

Texture filtering modes can be changed via DirectX Settings configuration tool. Press F9 key on the keyboard to return to main menu or quit the game.”

This re-released version of the game was co-developed by GOG.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/original-resident-evil-resident-evil-2-resident-evil-3-nemesis-and-breath-of-fire-iv-now-available-via-steam
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
